message:
Fix formatting and remove doc tests from CI (binary-only crate)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -18,30 +18,30 @@ env:
   CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
   RUST_BACKTRACE: 1
 
-jobs:
-  lint:
-    name: Lint
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    timeout-minutes: 10
-    steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-
-      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
-        with:
-          components: rustfmt, clippy
-
-      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
-
-      - name: Install native dependencies (Linux)
-        run: |
-          sudo apt-get update
-          sudo apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends libusb-1.0-0-dev libudev-dev pkg-config
-
-      - name: Check formatting
-        run: cargo fmt --all -- --check
-
-      - name: Clippy
-        run: cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings
+jobs:
+  lint:
+    name: Lint
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 10
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
+        with:
+          components: rustfmt, clippy
+
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+
+      - name: Install native dependencies (Linux)
+        run: |
+          sudo apt-get update
+          sudo apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends libusb-1.0-0-dev libudev-dev pkg-config
+
+      - name: Check formatting
+        run: cargo fmt --all -- --check
+
+      - name: Clippy
+        run: cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings
 
   test:
     name: Test (${{ matrix.os }})
@@ -63,8 +63,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Run tests
         run: cargo test --all-features --verbose
 
-      - name: Doc tests
-        run: cargo test --doc
+      # Skip doc tests - this is a binary-only crate with no library target
 
   security:
     name: Security Audit
